differential_diagnoses: Recurrent CNS diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL)
next_steps: Perform multiplex PCR testing on CSF for viral pathogens including VZV, HHV-6, JC virus, and CMV
Submit CSF for repeat cytology with specialized immunohistochemical staining (CD20, CD3, EBER-in-situ hybridization) to investigate the atypical lymphoid cells
Measure CSF cryptococcal antigen and fungal culture
Evaluate CSF for paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels
Perform contrast-enhanced MRI of the entire neuraxis (brain and spine) to evaluate for diffuse leptomeningeal disease
Consider brain biopsy if CSF studies remain nondiagnostic and clinical decline continues
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and neuro-oncology for urgent multidisciplinary management
